reviews.comment:
Baños impecables, que son muy utiles cuando estas esperando a que abra el paso para poder cruzar a chile. Muchisimo frio en la noche

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are spotless, which is very useful when you're waiting for the crossing to open so you can cross into Chile. It's very cold at night.

reviews.comment:
Tiene unas excelentes habitaciones para hospedarse cuando el paso está cerrado. Con calefacción central. Y un café con leche excelente !

(Translated by Google)
It has excellent rooms to stay in when the pass is closed. With central heating. And an excellent café con leche!
